---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the pain point or gap. What are you trying to do that Intel Hub doesn't support yet?

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work? Be as specific as you can — UI behavior, data flow, API endpoints, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Did you think about other approaches? What tradeoffs did you weigh?

## Which part of the app does this affect?

- [ ] Backend (`server.js` — feeds, APIs, WebSocket)
- [ ] Frontend (`src/` — React components, pages)
- [ ] Constants (`src/constants/` — severity rules, bias tags, credibility tiers)
- [ ] Infrastructure (PM2, deployment, CI/CD)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`)

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
